CategoryListingQuery.sig: ($alias: String!, $manufacturer_id: Int, $params: Any, $company_id: Int, $sort: String, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $regionId: Int, $includePremiumAdvBlock: Boolean = false, $subdomain: String, $regionDelivery: String)

CompanyListingQuery.sig: ($company_id: Int!, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $params: Any, $sort: String, $showShowroomProducts: Boolean!, $opinionPageType: String = null, $regionId: Int = null, $subdomain: String = null, $regionDelivery: String = null)

SearchListingQuery.sig: ($search_term: String!, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $params: Any, $company_id: Int, $sort: String, $regionId: Int = null, $subdomain: String = null, $regionDelivery: String = null, $includePremiumAdvBlock: Boolean = false)

ManufacturerListingQuery.sig: ($alias: String!, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $params: Any, $sort: String, $regionId: Int = null, $subdomain: String = null, $regionDelivery: String = null)

CategoryListingQuery_clean.sig: ($alias: String!, $manufacturer_id: Int, $params: Any, $company_id: Int, $sort: String, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $regionId: Int, $includePremiumAdvBlock: Boolean = false, $subdomain: String, $regionDelivery: String)
CategoryListingQuery_clean.query:
query CategoryListingQuery($alias: String!, $manufacturer_id: Int, $params: Any, $company_id: Int, $sort: String, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $regionId: Int, $includePremiumAdvBlock: Boolean = false, $subdomain: String, $regionDelivery: String) {
  listing: categoryListing(
    alias: $alias
    manufacturer_id: $manufacturer_id
    params: $params
    company_id: $company_id
    sort: $sort
    offset: $offset
    limit: $limit
    region: {id: $regionId, subdomain: $subdomain}
  ) {
    company {
      ...ShopInShopFragment
      id
      name
      city
      slug
      seoCategories {
        ...SeoLinkFragment
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    page {
      ...ProductsListFragment
      __typename
    }
    motors {
      ...MotorsListingContextFragment
      __typename
    }
    categories {
      childCategories {
        id
        alias
        caption
        imageUrl(width: 300, height: 300)
        isLastLevel
        verticalDomain
        children {
          id
          alias
          caption
          verticalDomain
          __typename
        }
        __typename
      }
      childSmartCategories {
        id
        alias
        caption
        imageUrl(width: 300, height: 300)
        __typename
      }
      seoTags {
        ...SeoLinkFragment
        __typename
      }
      topProducts {
        product {
          ...ProductsBlockInfoFragment
          __typename
        }
        advert {
          ...ProductItemAdvertFragment
          __typename
        }
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    manufacturer {
      id
      name
      alias
      __typename
    }
    category {
      id
      alias
      isB2B
      isB2C
      isService
      caption
      captionAccs
      alt_caption
      code
      path {
        id
        isRoot
        caption
        alias
        __typename
      }
      url
      isRoot
      minPriceLocal
      maxPriceLocal
      numProducts
      seoPageTitle
      seoPageDescription
      isLastLevel
      isWholesaleEnabled
      isCreditEnabled
      topParentId
      siblings(onlyRPayParts: true, limit: 5) {
        id
        alias
        caption
        isLastLevel
        verticalDomain
        __typename
      }
      additionalTextHtml
      vertical
      verticalDomain
      __typename
    }
    breadCrumbs {
      ...BreadcrumbsFragment
      __typename
    }
    advSource
    topManufacturers {
      id
      name
      alias
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  region(region: {id: $regionId, subdomain: $subdomain}) {
    id
    name
    nameF2
    seoName
    isCity
    subdomain
    __typename
  }
  regionDelivery: region(region: {subdomain: $regionDelivery}) {
    id
    name
    nameF2
    seoName
    isCity
    subdomain
    __typename
  }
  premiumAdvBlock(
    category_alias: $alias
    params: $params
    offset: 0
    limit: 10
    is_listing: true
  ) @include(if: $includePremiumAdvBlock) {
    products {
      ...ConvListingPremiumAdvFragment
      __typename
    }
    total
    __typename
  }
}

fragment ProductsBlockInfoFragment on Product {
  id
  company_id
  categoryId
  isComparisonAvailable
  groupId
  productTypeKey
  categoryIds
  priceUSD
  priceOriginal
  discountedPrice
  oioCategories
  name: nameForCatalog
  discountedAmount
  urlText
  priceCurrency
  image(width: 200, height: 200)
  image400x400: image(width: 400, height: 400)
  productOpinionCounters {
    rating
    count
    __typename
  }
  category {
    id
    verticalDomain
    __typename
  }
  company {
    id
    name
    isChatVisible
    deliveryStats {
      id
      deliverySpeed
      __typename
    }
    opinionStats {
      id
      opinionPositivePercent
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  signed_id
  buyButtonDisplayType
  report_start_chat_url
  isOrderable
  isAdult
  is14Plus
  model {
    id
    urlText
    name
    images200x200: images(width: 200, height: 200)
    images400x400: images(width: 400, height: 400)
    category {
      id
      isAdult
      is14Plus
      verticalDomain
      __typename
    }
    counters {
      rating
      count
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  ...ProductPriceFragment
  ...ProductPresenceFragment
  ...FavoriteProductFragment
  __typename
}

}

CategoryListingQuery_clean.template:
query CategoryListingQuery($alias: String!, $manufacturer_id: Int, $params: Any, $company_id: Int, $sort: String, $offset: Int, $limit: Int, $regionId: Int, $includePremiumAdvBlock: Boolean = false, $subdomain: String, $regionDelivery: String) {
  listing: categoryListing(
    alias: $alias
    manufacturer_id: $manufacturer_id
    params: $params
    company_id: $company_id
    sort: $sort
    offset: $offset
    limit: $limit
    region: {id: $regionId, subdomain: $subdomain}
  ) {
    company {
      ...ShopInShopFragment
      id
      name
      city
      slug
      seoCategories {
        ...SeoLinkFragment
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    page {
      ...ProductsListFragment
      __typename
    }
    motors {
      ...MotorsListingContextFragment
      __typename
    }
    categories {
      childCategories {
        id
        alias
        caption
        imageUrl(width: 300, height: 300)
        isLastLevel
        verticalDomain
        children {
          id
          alias
          caption
          verticalDomain
          __typename
        }
        __typename
      }
      childSmartCategories {
        id
        alias
        caption
        imageUrl(width: 300, height: 300)
        __typename
      }
      seoTags {
        ...SeoLinkFragment
        __typename
      }
      topProducts {
        product {
          ...ProductsBlockInfoFragment
          __typename
        }
        advert {
          ...ProductItemAdvertFragment
          __typename
        }
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    manufacturer {
      id
      name
      alias
      __typename
    }
    category {
      id
      alias
      isB2B
      isB2C
      isService
      caption
      captionAccs
      alt_caption
      code
      path {
        id
        isRoot
        caption
        alias
        __typename
      }
      url
      isRoot
      minPriceLocal
      maxPriceLocal
      numProducts
      seoPageTitle
      seoPageDescription
      isLastLevel
      isWholesaleEnabled
      isCreditEnabled
      topParentId
      siblings(onlyRPayParts: true, limit: 5) {
        id
        alias
        caption
        isLastLevel
        verticalDomain
        __typename
      }
      additionalTextHtml
      vertical
      verticalDomain
      __typename
    }
    breadCrumbs {
      ...BreadcrumbsFragment
      __typename
    }
    advSource
    topManufacturers {
      id
      name
      alias
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  region(region: {id: $regionId, subdomain: $subdomain}) {
    id
    name
    nameF2
    seoName
    isCity
    subdomain
    __typename
  }
  regionDelivery: region(region: {subdomain: $regionDelivery}) {
    id
    name
    nameF2
    seoName
    isCity
    subdomain
    __typename
  }
  premiumAdvBlock(
    category_alias: $alias
    params: $params
    offset: 0
    limit: 10
    is_listing: true
  ) @include(if: $includePremiumAdvBlock) {
    products {
      ...ConvListingPremiumAdvFragment
      __typename
    }
    total
    __typename
  }
}
